'''yapofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ngina|ngina]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-p-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ngina|ngina]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| yapofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæpefeth|yæpefeth]] || [[word:yæpefej|yæpefej]] || [[word:yæpefesh|yæpefesh]] || [[word:yæpefe|yæpefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yapopofoth|yapopofoth]] || [[word:yapopofoj|yapopofoj]] || [[word:yapopofosh|yapopofosh]] || [[word:yapopofo|yapopofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yapofoth|yapofoth]] || [[word:yapofoj|yapofoj]] || [[word:yapofosh|yapofosh]] || [[word:yapofo|yapofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yapoffoth|yapoffoth]] || [[word:yapoffoj|yapoffoj]] || [[word:yapoffosh|yapoffosh]] || [[word:yapoffof|yapoffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yapofotho|yapofotho]] || [[word:yapofojo|yapofojo]] || [[word:yapofosho|yapofosho]] || [[word:yapofoko|yapofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yapofoth|yapofoth]] || [[word:yapofoj|yapofoj]] || [[word:yapofosh|yapofosh]] || [[word:yapofo|yapofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yapofothol|yapofothol]] || [[word:yapofojol|yapofojol]] || [[word:yapofoshol|yapofoshol]] || [[word:yapofokol|yapofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yapofothotho|yapofothotho]] || [[word:yapofojojo|yapofojojo]] || [[word:yapofoshosho|yapofoshosho]] || [[word:yapofoko|yapofoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yapofothon|yapofothon]] || [[word:yapofojon|yapofojon]] || [[word:yapofoshon|yapofoshon]] || [[word:yapofokon|yapofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yapofothoro|yapofothoro]] || [[word:yapofojoro|yapofojoro]] || [[word:yapofoshoro|yapofoshoro]] || [[word:yapofokoro|yapofokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
